General.Name: Basetrophy Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Basetrophy Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a substructure subcontractor in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. It operates through Foundation and Related Works Business; and Alcoholic Beverages Trading Business segments. The company provides foundation works, including excavation and lateral support, sheet piling, pipe piling, pre-boring, pre-bored H-piling, mini-piling, and bored piling works; site formation works; and other geotechnical engineering works, such as slope works and shotcreting. It also trades in and distributes alcoholic beverages. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Park Fook Industrial Building, Cheung Sha Wan, Hong Kong

2.Name: Mr. Kui Ming  Chan
